name: Zigzag Kiln Conversion
description: Converts traditional Bull’s Trench kiln airflow into a zigzag pattern, improving combustion efficiency and significantly reducing particulate emissions while lowering coal consumption.
incentives: Punjab EPA Zigzag Conversion Enforcement & Support Program
World Bank Brick Kiln Cleaner Production Initiative (technical support)

name: Biomass Co-Firing
description: Partial replacement of coal with agricultural biomass such as rice husk reduces sulphur and carbon emissions and promotes cleaner combustion at relatively low cost.
incentives: ENERCON Energy Efficiency & Fuel Switching Support

name: Improved Chimney / Stack Design
description: Enhancing chimney height and draft improves dispersion of pollutants and stabilizes airflow, reducing local pollution concentration and improving combustion performance.

name: Coal Washing Before Combustion
description: Pre-cleaning coal removes ash and sulphur impurities, leading to more efficient combustion and reduced particulate and SOx emissions without structural changes.

name: Fuel Switching to Natural Gas
description: Switching from coal to natural gas significantly reduces particulate matter and sulphur emissions due to cleaner combustion, but depends on gas availability.

name: Waste Heat Recovery System
description: Captures heat from exhaust gases and reuses it for preheating or drying, reducing overall fuel consumption and improving energy efficiency.
